name: agent_task_progress_read
description: Retrieve saved progress data for tasks the agent is working on. Use this to resume work after execution interruptions, check current status, or review execution history. Agent context is automatically inferred from the agent's team membership.

task_id.description: Specific task ID to retrieve progress for. If not provided, returns progress for all active tasks.

status_filter.description: Filter by progress status. If not provided, returns all statuses.

include_completed.description: Whether to include completed or error status tasks in results

limit.description: Maximum number of progress records to return
